creator: janm@transactionware.com
text:
Sorry about the delay. VMware on the iMac did not successfully boot FreeBSD. I'm not sure why; trying on a MacBook running on a later version of macOS worked fine.

Using the FreeBSD 12.3 Live CD, the same problem occurs under VMware. After each disconnect I need to reconnect the device using VMware, but otherwise identical to the real system. I tried with VMware emulating both USB 2 and USB 1.1 hardware.

On the same system, same hub, same device, same cables:

- Windows XP under VMware works fine.
- Native macOS works fine.

Getting a USB trace on macOS seems to be difficult. I'll see what I can do for getting a trace from Windows.
